name: threshold
source_citation: Metadata consistency: 100% of retained spectra must pass RDKit SMILES/InChI/InChIKey round-trip validation (no mismatches after RDKit re-serialization).

name: tolerance
source_citation: Parent mass validation: 100% of retained spectra must satisfy |monoisotopic_mass(SMILES) − recorded_parent_mass| ≤ 1 ppm (or your chosen tolerance).
